Keepa is ready

Price history right on Amazon product pages.
    Open Amazon
    Tip
    • If an Amazon page was open during install, reload it to activate Keepa.
    • On mobile/compact layouts the graph is a bit further down - scroll to see it.
    • No need to click the toolbar icon - the Keepa box appears automatically.
    Supported sites:
    You can configure all options inside the Keepa box on any Amazon product page.
